goal: Have working query hooks, upload hook, and image-compression ready before wiring any pages.
summary: Backend Plumbing phase complete. Installed browser-image-compression and zustand packages. Created useUpload.ts with image compression and Supabase Storage integration. Created plants.ts with 5 query hooks (usePlants, usePlant, useAddPlant, useUpdatePlant, useDeletePlant). Created careLogs.ts with 2 query hooks (useCareLogs, useAddCareLog). All files pass TypeScript compilation with zero errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Install browser-image-compression and zustand packages [verified]
  2. Create src/hooks/useUpload.ts that wraps Supabase Storage upload with image compression (max 1MB, 1920px) [verified]
  3. Create src/queries/plants.ts with usePlants, usePlant(id), useAddPlant, useUpdatePlant, useDeletePlant [verified]
  4. Create src/queries/careLogs.ts with useCareLogs(plantId) and useAddCareLog [verified]
  5. Type-check the project to ensure new hooks compile [verified]
